title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a news roundup featuring recent AI releases including Pixal3D for 3D generation, SANA-WM as an open-source world model, MiniCPM as a multimodal model, Krea2 for video generation, AsymFlow for image synthesis, ChatGPT Finance, and Codex mobile access. The episode covers 30+ tools spanning 3D generation, video synthesis, music AI, and multimodal models.
